title: Exercises: Trapped Ion Gates
description: Practice gate calculations for trapped ion systems

exercises.title: Rabi Oscillations
exercises.description: Simulate Rabi oscillations and calculate the time for a pi/2 pulse.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def rabi_dynamics(Omega_MHz: float, t_us: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:
    """Calculate |1> state probability during Rabi oscillations."""
    Omega = Omega_MHz * 1e6 * 2 * np.pi
    t = t_us * 1e-6
    P1 = # Your calculation (sin^2(Omega*t/2))
    return P1

t = np.linspace(0, 10, 200)
P1 = rabi_dynamics(Omega_MHz=0.5, t_us=t)

plt.plot(t, P1)
plt.xlabel('Time (us)')
plt.ylabel('P(|1>)')
plt.show()
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def rabi_dynamics(Omega_MHz, t_us):
    Omega = Omega_MHz * 1e6 * 2 * np.pi
    t = t_us * 1e-6
    P1 = np.sin(Omega * t / 2)**2
    return P1

t = np.linspace(0, 10, 200)
P1 = rabi_dynamics(0.5, t)

t_pi = 1 / (0.5 * 2)  # pi pulse time in us
t_pi_half = t_pi / 2

print(f"Pi pulse time: {t_pi:.2f} us")
print(f"Pi/2 pulse time: {t_pi_half:.2f} us")

plt.plot(t, P1)
plt.xlabel('Time (us)')
plt.ylabel('P(|1>)')
plt.axvline(t_pi_half, color='r', linestyle='--', label='pi/2')
plt.axvline(t_pi, color='g', linestyle='--', label='pi')
plt.legend()
plt.show()

exercises.title: MS Gate Fidelity
exercises.description: Estimate the MS gate fidelity given heating rate and gate time.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

# Parameters
gate_time_us = 100  # Gate duration
heating_rate = 10  # phonons/ms
initial_nbar = 0.05  # After sideband cooling

# Calculate phonons added during gate
phonons_added = # Your calculation

# Infidelity scales as ~phonons_added for small heating
# Approximate formula: infidelity ~ 2 * phonons_added / (1 + phonons_added)
infidelity = # Your calculation
fidelity = 1 - infidelity

print(f"Phonons added: {phonons_added:.3f}")
print(f"Estimated fidelity: {fidelity*100:.2f}%")
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

gate_time_us = 100
heating_rate = 10  # phonons/ms = 0.01 phonons/us
initial_nbar = 0.05

phonons_added = heating_rate * gate_time_us / 1000  # = 1.0 phonon
final_nbar = initial_nbar + phonons_added

# Simplified infidelity model
infidelity = 0.02 * phonons_added  # ~2% per phonon added (simplified)
fidelity = 1 - infidelity

print(f"Phonons added during gate: {phonons_added:.3f}")
print(f"Final n_bar: {final_nbar:.3f}")
print(f"Estimated infidelity: {infidelity*100:.1f}%")
print(f"Estimated fidelity: {fidelity*100:.1f}%")
print(f"\nTo achieve 99.9% fidelity, need < 0.05 phonons added")
print(f"Requires gate time < {0.05/heating_rate*1000:.1f} us or lower heating rate")
